claims_allowed: Phase 11 provides a reproducible, public-safe external-memory benchmark track.
Synthetic-mini and LOCOMO-mini fixture reports can compare ShyftR, no-memory, and optional mem0 OSS under one runner contract.
LOCOMO-standard support is local-path, private-by-default mapping/conversion scaffolding unless an operator supplies a public-safe local file and run report.
Reports disclose top-k values, timeout/retry/resume controls, cost/latency summaries, limitations, and claim boundaries.
claims_not_allowed: No broad ShyftR superiority claim is supported by Phase 11 fixture runs.
No full LOCOMO, LongMemEval, or BEAM result is claimed unless a separate local run report is supplied and reviewed.
No hosted-service, production-managed-memory, or private-core ranking claim is made.
No runner-owned answer-quality result is claimed beyond retrieval/control metrics currently implemented.

datasets.claim: Mapping and guarded conversion readiness only unless a local run report is supplied
datasets.name: locomo-standard
BEAM
datasets.scope: Future large-scale retrieval once local costs are controlled

tranches.summary: Fixture-safe runner, ShyftR/no-memory baseline, output guards
Optional mem0 OSS comparator with skipped status when unavailable
LOCOMO-mini fixture and public-safe report path
Deterministic retry execution and retry accounting
LOCOMO local conversion helper and manifest sidecar
Closing report and polished HTML benchmark dossier
